alt: Tilt-shift-style blurred sunrise / sunset over a distant ridge.

alt: Three women hugging from behind, watching the sunset over the playa.

alt: A blue BMW sedan parked on a dry desert lakebed with mountains behind and a distant camp on the horizon.

alt: A grand Victorian hotel facade outlined entirely in warm Christmas lights, glowing against the night.

alt: Black-and-white view of a downtown street at night, headlights streaking between rows of parked cars and lit storefronts.

alt: Close-up of variegated purple-heart leaves cradling a new pink-and-green shoot at the center.

alt: Silhouette of a friend seated in an armchair, backlit by a tall window, the room dim around them.

alt: A single warm rectangle of light glowing through a doorway into an otherwise dark room.

alt: Black-and-white candid of a friend mid-stretch beside an outdoor picnic table, eucalyptus shade behind.

alt: A figure stands on the playa with arms raised wide, silhouetted against the low setting sun.

alt: Festival speaker towers silhouetted against the deep red and orange sky of the desert sunset.
